error.signature: version_conflict_engine_exception: [doc_id]: version conflict, required seqNo [5], primary term [1]

verdict.summary: Optimistic concurrency control conflict. Document was modified by another process between read and write.

dead_ends.why_fails: Force overwrites silently lose concurrent updates; data corruption risk
Immediate retry on conflict often hits the same conflict; needs read-modify-write cycle

workarounds.action: Implement read-modify-write with if_seq_no and if_primary_term
workarounds.how: GET doc -> modify -> PUT with if_seq_no=X&if_primary_term=Y -> retry on 409

workarounds.action: Use update API with script for atomic field updates
Add retry with exponential backoff on conflict
workarounds.how: Retry the full read-modify-write cycle 3-5 times with backoff
